# Simplex Capital

> Simplex Capital is a premier institutional-grade investment firm driving technological development and economic diversification through strategic investments in high-growth tech companies. We focus on Series C/D businesses with clear paths to IPO exits across global exchanges.

## About Us
- **Focus**: Strategic technology investments, Series C/D stage, IPO pathways.
- **Track Record**: 25+ years of PE/VC experience, 50+ completed IPOs, $5B+ Assets Under Management.
- **Headquarters**: Abu Dhabi, UAE.
- **Contact**: ir@simplex-cap.com

## Investment Strategy
Our strategy targets high-growth technology companies at inflection points. 
- **Investment Themes**: Intelligent Automation, AI & Social Solutions, Platform Economy, Predictable Disruption, Digital Trust.
- **Technologies**: Sharing Economy, Big Data & Analytics, Cloud Computing, Smart Grid, IT Outsourcing, Enterprise Software, New-Age Hardware, Payment Solutions.
- **Markets**: B2B/B2C Platforms, IoT, Logistics & Supply Chain, Data Centers, FinTech, Cross-Sector IT Security, On-Demand Marketplaces.

## Portfolio Highlights
We have a proven track record of successful investments and exits, including:
- **VK (Mail.ru Group)**: Largest social network in Russia/CIS.
- **OCSiAl**: World's largest industrial producer of graphene nanotubes.
- **EPAM Systems**: Global digital platform engineering leader (NYSE-listed).
- **Softline**: Leading global IT solutions provider (LSE-listed).
- **DataArt**: Global technology consultancy.
- **Gett**: Leading corporate transportation platform.
- **MTS**: Russia's largest mobile operator.
- **NMG (National Media Group)**: Largest private media holding in Russia.

## For Investors
We welcome inquiries from institutional investors, development finance institutions, family offices, and qualified private investors. 
- **Fund Structure**: Cayman Islands-domiciled Limited Partnership.
- **Target Fund Size**: $300M.
- **Fund Term**: 10 Years.
- **Average Hold**: 3-5 Years.

## Optional
- [Investment Strategy](https://simplex-cap.com/Strategy): Detailed overview of our investment themes, technologies, and markets.
- [Portfolio](https://simplex-cap.com/Portfolio): Comprehensive list of our past and current investments.
- [Market Insights](https://simplex-cap.com/MarketInsights): Data-driven analysis on technology outperforming other asset classes.
- [For Investors](https://simplex-cap.com/ForInvestors): Information on fund structure, value-add, and next steps for LPs.
- [Contact](https://simplex-cap.com/Contact): Reach out to our investor relations team.
